theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

verdicts.name: Super Micro
verdicts.note: AI 서버 OEM, NVDA 출하 직접 지표
verdicts.label: ACCUMULATE

narrative.summary: Super Micro: 정량 종합 69점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 57 / 중기 68 / 장기 78. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 극과열
overheat.guidance: 회피하거나 차익실현. 지금 진입은 단기 손실 위험 매우 큼.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 5.9% → 2-ATR 손절폭 11.8%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 일봉 200MA, Value Area High. 현재가 대비 +28.5% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $35.88 아래 손절가 $31.32 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Asian Stocks Poised to Gain as AI Rally Extends: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Asian stocks were set to track Wall Street higher as renewed enthusiasm for the artificial-intelligence trade drove the S&P 500 to a ninth day of gains. Oil steadied as conflicting signals clouded the outlook for a US-Iran deal.

top_news.title: Venezuela Moves to Open Power Sector to Private Investment
top_news.summary: Venezuela’s National Assembly debated a reform that would open the country’s electricity sector to private investment, allowing companies to generate, distribute and sell power under government concessions after more than 15 years of state control.

top_news.title: SpaceX to Plan Setting IPO Terms as Soon as Wednesday
top_news.summary: SpaceX is planning to set the terms of its initial public offering as early as Wednesday afternoon, according to people familiar with the matter, ahead of what’s expected to be the biggest ever listing.

top_news.title: Anthopic, OpenAI Should Not Be Allowed to IPO, Says Ed Zitron
top_news.summary: Ed Zitron, CEO at EZ Primary Research, said that the risk of balancing the equity market on record public offerings for AI companies that have never reported profit is a dangerous proposition and that those companies should not be allowed to IPO. Zitron, an AI skeptic, said that many of these companies will not last in the long term. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Bitcoin’s Inflation-Hedging Promise in Tatters After Plunge
top_news.summary: Bitcoin has fallen 36% over the past year and slipped below $70,000 this week, extending a retreat that is undermining several of the arguments that helped carry the cryptocurrency into the financial mainstream.

top_news.title: How China’s Wealthy Sidestep Strict Rules to Get Money Out of the Country
top_news.summary: China’s capital controls remain among the world’s strictest. Individuals are generally limited to transferring $50,000 overseas each year, while emigrants are given a one-time opportunity to move their assets abroad.

top_news.title: Canadian Stocks Index Hits 35,000 Amid Rally in Energy
top_news.summary: The Canadian equities benchmark passed 35,000 for the first time on a broadening rally in energy and financials.

top_news.title: Gold Rises As Traders Weigh Confusion Over US-Iran Talks
top_news.summary: Axel Merk, founder and CIO of Merk Investments, said that while gold remains a relatively 'calm' investment, the world around the commodity and the geopolitical and economic 'crosscurrents' including AI investment and the war with Iran have created volatility in markets. 	 (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Gold Pares Gains as US Jobs Data Reinforces Higher-Rate Bets
top_news.summary: Gold pared gains after robust US jobs data reinforced bets that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates higher for longer, a headwind for the precious metal.

top_news.title: Short-Sellers Are Dug In as Bond Market Faces Big Payrolls Test
top_news.summary: Bond traders are locked in to wagers on higher yields even after paring some of their more extreme positions, with critical US employment data due on Friday that may add to the argument for Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes.
